headline: Woman's 'Emotional Support Water Bottle' Has A Name, A Bedtime, And A Social Media Following
summary: Bottle (his name is Hydrangea) has 47,000 followers. He's more popular than she is.
fullBody: Amanda Hydration has an emotional support water bottle named 'Hydrangea.' Hydrangea has a bedtime (9 PM), a morning routine, and an Instagram (@HydrangeaTheBottle). 'He's my anchor,' Amanda said. Hydrangea has 47,000 followers. Amanda has 12,000. 'It's fine,' Amanda said. 'He's humble.' Hydrangea does not speak. Hydrangea just holds water. It's the most popular thing Amanda has ever owned. She's 'processing.'
